issues_found: Source is a listing_page containing aggregated links to multiple documents from 2017-2025, not a single archiveable research document
No specific publication date on the page itself (published_at is empty)
Cannot assign a meaningful single event_type from the taxonomy to an aggregated listing page
event_type is set to 'unknown' when the correct action would be to reject based on page type
Page aggregates heterogeneous content (letters, reports, FAQs, daily activity) without coherent focus
Cannot extract specific market-impactful events or data from this navigation hub
human_review_reason: The record correctly identifies this as a listing page. Per Rule 5, listing pages must be rejected. The human review fields contain notes that align with this verdict.
